data.text/markdown:
Practice: Car Collision Detection

Dataset: Organized Car Collision Prediction Dataset
Load PyTorch
Download Dataset

console.name: stdout
console.text:
Extracting files...
Base path to dataset files: /home/dejan/.cache/kagglehub/datasets/isratjahankhan/organized-car-collision-prediction-dataset/versions/1

data.text/markdown:
Augment Data

Data augmentation should include:
  • Darken by 5%, 10%, 15%, 20% (under-exposure)
  • Brighen by 5%, 10%, 15%, 20% (over-exposure)
  • Horizontal Flip
  • Motion blur
  • Gaussian blur
  • Salt-and-pepper Noise

console.name: stdout
console.text:
Gathering original files for train set
Found 6999 original images in train set.
Found 6999 original images. Starting parallel processing...

console.text: All images successfully augmented in parallel!

data.text/markdown: Load Dataset

               ToTensor()

           )
